initiatives.name: Food Not Bombs Cape Cod
initiatives.description: Join us for free vegan meals, community, mutual aid, and direct action on Cape Cod.

initiatives.name: Cape Cod DSA
initiatives.description: An activist organization, not a political party. Fighting against oppression in its many forms.

initiatives.name: PFLAG Cape Cod
initiatives.description: Creating a caring, just, and affirming world for LGBTQ+ people and those who love them.

initiatives.name: Plymouth Anarchist Collective
initiatives.description: Anarchist group holding workshops and mutual aid drives.

initiatives.name: Plymouth for Palestine
initiatives.description: A Plymouth community coalition advocating for an immediate arms embargo, ceasefire, and end to the occupation
